DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. 1. [PLAINTIFF'S] MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY GRANTED; ROAR ADVERTISING CORPORATION DBA ROAR ADVERTISING, BROOKE R. ZAUGG AKA BROOKE R. RONER AKA BROOKE S. RONER, AND LARS INGEMAN RONER AKA LARS RONER SHALL EACH SEPARATELY SERVE FULL, COMPLETE AND VERIFIED ANSWERS TO PLAINTIFF'S POST-JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES, AND RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S POST-JUDGMENT DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN TEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER; ALL OBJECTIONS ARE WAIVED, WITH THE EXCEPTION OF ATTORNEY-CLIENT AND ATTORNEY-WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGE; 2. REQUEST FOR AWARD OF SANCTIONS GRANTED; SANCTIONS SHALL ISSUE IN THE TOTAL SUM OF $500.00 AGAINST DEFENDANTS ROAR ADVERTISING CORPORATION DBA ROAR ADVERTISING, BROOKE R. ZAUGG AKA BROOKE R. RONER AKA BROOKE S. RONER, AND LARS INGEMAN RONER AKA LARS RONER, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. PROVIDED, HOWEVER, THAT IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS IS STAYED FOR TEN DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER; IF DEFENDANTS SERVE DISCOVERY RESPONSE AS ORDERED WITHIN TEN DAYS OF THIS ORDER, SANCTIONS SHALL BE PERMANENTLY STAYED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar May-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion for assignment of rights, restraining and turnover order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. No opposition filed. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. 1. [Plaintiff's] Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery granted; Roar Advertising Corporation dba Roar Advertising, Brooke R. Zaugg aka Brooke R. Roner aka Brooke S. Roner, and Lars Ingeman Roner aka Lars Roner shall each separately serve full, complete and verified answers to plaintiff's post-judgment interrogatories, and responses to plaintiff's post-judgment Demand for production of documents within ten days of the date of this order; all objections are waived, with the exception of attorney-client and attorney-work product privilege;
2. Request For Award Of Sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the total sum of $500.00 against defendants Roar Advertising Corporation dba Roar Advertising, Brooke R. Zaugg aka Brooke R. Roner aka Brooke S. Roner, and Lars Ingeman Roner aka Lars Roner, jointly and severally. Provided, however, that imposition of sanctions is stayed for ten days from the date of this order; if defendants serve discovery response as ordered within ten days of this order, sanctions shall be permanently stayed. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. Not reported.
